title: Smoky Mediterranean Quinoa Pilaf
description: A smoky and crumbly Mediterranean dish featuring quinoa, perfect for a date night, and jain-friendly
instructions: Rinse the quinoa in a fine mesh strainer and drain well.
In a medium saucepan, bring the quinoa and water to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 15 minutes.
Shock the cooked quinoa in an ice bath to stop the cooking process.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the smoked paprika and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the cherry tomatoes, kalamata olives, and artichoke hearts, and cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Fluff the cooled quinoa with a fork and add it to the skillet, stirring to combine.
Season with salt and pepper to taste, then stir in the crumbled feta cheese if using.
Transfer the pilaf to a serving dish and garnish with chopped fresh parsley.
